list.name: Config and Control Changes
list.textFormat: Verification policy or training control action detected

list.name: Incident Signal Burst
list.textFormat: Trust failure burst suggests deploy/config regression candidate

targets.expr: avg(tpm_node_trust_score) or max(((clamp_max(100 * (tpm_certificates_verified_total / clamp_min(tpm_certificates_total, 1)), 100) and (tpm_certificates_total > 0)) or (100 * tpm_ca_certificate_valid))) or vector(0)

panels.title: TPM Cache Hit vs Miss Rate

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, target, mode) (rate(mohawk_tpm_lock_wait_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]))) * 1000000 or vector(0)

title: SovereignMap | STARRED | Operations Live Overview
description: Starred, easy-read operations NOC dashboard with live refresh, SLO strip, and clear drilldowns.
